mapper.select: select count(*) num from ( select tfa_alarm_last_sum.first_result g1, tfa_alarm_last_sum.ne_type g2, max(tfa_alarm_last_sum.ne_name) g3, tfa_alarm_last_sum.network_type_top g4, sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.total_alarm_num) g5, sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.total_alarm_num) g6, sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.final_sheet_num) g7, sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.final_sheet_num) g8, sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.accord_rule_alarm_num) g9, sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.accord_rule_alarm_num) g10, sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.total_alarm_time) g11, round(sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.total_alarm_time)/sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.total_alarm_num),2) g12, sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.final_sheet_time) g13, round(sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.final_sheet_time)/sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.total_alarm_num),2) g14, sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.accord_rule_alarm_time) g15, round(sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.accord_rule_alarm_time)/sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.total_alarm_num),2) g16, tfa_alarm_last_sum.sum_level g17, tfa_alarm_last_sum.ne_id g18 from tfa_alarm_last_sum tfa_alarm_last_sum where tfa_alarm_last_sum.first_result >= to_date(#{time1}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_last_sum.first_result <= to_date(#{time2}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and (tfa_alarm_last_sum.ne_id in (${areaID}) or '-1' in (${areaID}) ) and (tfa_alarm_last_sum.network_type_top in (${professional}) or '-1' in (${professional}) ) and tfa_alarm_last_sum.sum_level = #{sum_level} group by tfa_alarm_last_sum.first_result,tfa_alarm_last_sum.ne_id,tfa_alarm_last_sum.ne_type,tfa_alarm_last_sum.network_type_top,tfa_alarm_last_sum.sum_level )

select * from (select a.*, rowNum m_rowNum from (select tfa_alarm_last_sum.first_result g1, tfa_alarm_last_sum.ne_type g2, max(tfa_alarm_last_sum.ne_name) g3, tfa_alarm_last_sum.network_type_top g4, sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.total_alarm_num) g5, sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.total_alarm_num) g6, sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.final_sheet_num) g7, sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.final_sheet_num) g8, sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.accord_rule_alarm_num) g9, sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.accord_rule_alarm_num) g10, sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.total_alarm_time) g11, round(sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.total_alarm_time) / sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.total_alarm_num), 2) g12, sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.final_sheet_time) g13, round(sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.final_sheet_time) / sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.total_alarm_num), 2) g14, sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.accord_rule_alarm_time) g15, round(sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.accord_rule_alarm_time) / sum(tfa_alarm_last_sum.total_alarm_num), 2) g16, tfa_alarm_last_sum.sum_level g17, tfa_alarm_last_sum.ne_id g18 from tfa_alarm_last_sum tfa_alarm_last_sum where tfa_alarm_last_sum.first_result >= to_date(#{time1}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_last_sum.first_result <= to_date(#{time2}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and (tfa_alarm_last_sum.ne_id in (${areaID}) or '-1' in (${areaID}) ) and (tfa_alarm_last_sum.network_type_top in (${professional}) or '-1' in (${professional}) ) and tfa_alarm_last_sum.sum_level = #{sum_level} group by tfa_alarm_last_sum.first_result, tfa_alarm_last_sum.ne_id, tfa_alarm_last_sum.ne_type, tfa_alarm_last_sum.network_type_top, tfa_alarm_last_sum.sum_level) a) Where m_rowNum > #{BegeinIndex} and m_rowNum <= #{EndIndex}
select '日' as txt, 1 id from dual union all select '周' as txt, 2 id from dual union all select '月' as txt, 3 id from dual
select distinct province_name as txt, province_id as id from region_city_local union all select distinct region_name as txt, region_id as id from region_city_local
Select ID , txt From TIA_ALARM_DICT where Type = 1317

select count(*) num from (select to_char(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w1, tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.ne_name w2, sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.final_sheet_num) w4, sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.notnull_sheet_num) w5, tia_alarm_dict.txt w8, sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.total_alarm_num) W9, (100-round(decode(sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.total_alarm_num),0,0,sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.notnull_sheet_num)/sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.total_alarm_num)*100),2))||'%' W12 from nmosdb.tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum, nmosdb.tia_alarm_dict tia_alarm_dict where tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.first_result >=to_date(#{time1},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.first_result <=to_date(#{time2},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.sum_level= #{sum_level} and (tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.ne_id in (${province}) or '-1' in (${province})) and (tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.Region_id in (${region_id}) or '-1' in (${region_id})) and tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.network_type_top = tia_alarm_dict.id and tia_alarm_dict.type = 1001 and tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.send_rule ='专业' group by tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.first_result,tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.ne_name,tia_alarm_dict.txt )

select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from (select to_char(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w1, tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.ne_name w2, sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.final_sheet_num) w4, sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.notnull_sheet_num) w5, tia_alarm_dict.txt w8, sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.total_alarm_num) W9, (100-round(decode(sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.total_alarm_num),0,0,sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.notnull_sheet_num)/sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.total_alarm_num)*100),2))||'%' W12 from nmosdb.tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum, nmosdb.tia_alarm_dict tia_alarm_dict where tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.first_result >=to_date(#{time1},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.first_result <=to_date(#{time2},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.sum_level= #{sum_level} and (tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.ne_id in (${province}) or '-1' in (${province})) and (tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.Region_id in (${region_id}) or '-1' in (${region_id})) and tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.network_type_top = tia_alarm_dict.id and tia_alarm_dict.type = 1001 and tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.send_rule ='专业' group by tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.first_result,tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.ne_name,tia_alarm_dict.txt )a ) Where m_rowNum > #{BegeinIndex} and m_rowNum <= #{EndIndex}
select '日' as txt, 1 id from dual union all select '月' as txt, 3 id from dual
select distinct province_id id,province_name txt from region_city order by province_name

select count(*) from (select to_char(tfa_alarm_project_sum.first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w1, tfa_alarm_project_sum.ne_name w2, tfa_alarm_project_sum.ne_id ne_id, tia_alarm_dict.txt w3, tfa_alarm_project_sum.network_type_top network_type_top, tfa_alarm_project_sum.alarm_proj_num w4 from tfa_alarm_project_sum tfa_alarm_project_sum, tia_alarm_dict tia_alarm_dict where tfa_alarm_project_sum.network_type_top=tia_alarm_dict.id and tia_alarm_dict.type=1317 and tfa_alarm_project_sum.first_result =to_date(#{time1},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_project_sum.sum_level=#{sum_level} and tfa_alarm_project_sum.ne_id in (${areaID})
)

select count(*) num from ( select to_char(first_result ,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w1, to_char(first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w2, ac_rule_name w3, case when relation_type =4 then '衍生关联' when relation_type =1 then '主次关联' else '-' end w4, case when in_user_flag='1' then '是' else '否' end w5, parent_alarm_num w6, sub_alarm_num w7, parent_alarm_num w8, case when org_alarm_event_time is null then '-' else rtrim(to_char(org_alarm_event_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')) end w9, '正常' w10 from tpa_alarmrelation_jt_sum where tpa_alarmrelation_jt_sum.first_result >=to_date(#{time1},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tpa_alarmrelation_jt_sum.first_result <=to_date(#{time2},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and sum_level=#{sum_level} )

select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from ( select to_char(first_result ,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w1, to_char(first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w2, ac_rule_name w3, case when relation_type =4 then '衍生关联' when relation_type =1 then '主次关联' else '-' end w4, case when in_user_flag='1' then '是' else '否' end w5, parent_alarm_num w6, sub_alarm_num w7, parent_alarm_num w8, case when org_alarm_event_time is null then '-' else rtrim(to_char(org_alarm_event_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')) end w9, '正常' w10 from tpa_alarmrelation_jt_sum where tpa_alarmrelation_jt_sum.first_result >=to_date(#{time1},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tpa_alarmrelation_jt_sum.first_result <=to_date(#{time2},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and sum_level=#{sum_level} )a ) Where m_rowNum > ${BegeinIndex} and m_rowNum <= ${EndIndex}

select count(*) num from ( select to_char(tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w1, tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.sendrule_name w2, nvl(tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.sendrule_effective_nums,0) w3, tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.latest_time w4, nvl(tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.accord_rule_alarm_num,0) w5, nvl(tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.final_sheet_num,0) w6, nvl(tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.notnull_sheet_num,0) w7, nvl(tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.auto_sheet_num,0) w8, tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.is_use_flag w9 from tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum where tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.first_result >=to_date(#{time1},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.first_result <=to_date(#{time2},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.sum_level=#{sum_level} order by tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.sendrule_effective_nums desc )

select count(*) num from ( select to_char(tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') g1, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.eqp_object_class eqp_object_class, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.prj_flag prj_flag, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.board_type board_type, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.layer_rate layer_rate, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.network_type network_type, tia_alarm_dict3.txt g2, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.vendor_name g3, tia_alarm_dict1.txt g4, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.alarm_title g5, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.unstandard_alarm_num g6, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.probable_cause g7, tfa_alarm_standard_dic.txt g8, tia_alarm_dict2.txt g9 from tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type =9) tia_alarm_dict1 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.eqp_object_class = tia_alarm_dict1.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1314) tia_alarm_dict2 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.board_type = tia_alarm_dict2.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 110701) tfa_alarm_standard_dic on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.layer_rate = tfa_alarm_standard_dic.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1037) tia_alarm_dict3 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.network_type = tia_alarm_dict3.id where tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.first_result >=to_date(#{time1},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.first_result <=to_date(#{time2},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and (prj_flag in (${prj_flag}) or '-1' in (${prj_flag}) ) )

select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from (select to_char(tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') g1, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.eqp_object_class eqp_object_class, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.prj_flag prj_flag, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.board_type board_type, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.layer_rate layer_rate, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.network_type network_type, tia_alarm_dict3.txt g2, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.vendor_name g3, tia_alarm_dict1.txt g4, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.alarm_title g5, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.unstandard_alarm_num g6, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.probable_cause g7, tfa_alarm_standard_dic.txt g8, tia_alarm_dict2.txt g9 from tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type =9) tia_alarm_dict1 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.eqp_object_class = tia_alarm_dict1.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1314) tia_alarm_dict2 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.board_type = tia_alarm_dict2.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 110701) tfa_alarm_standard_dic on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.layer_rate = tfa_alarm_standard_dic.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1037) tia_alarm_dict3 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.network_type = tia_alarm_dict3.id where tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.first_result >=to_date(#{time1},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.first_result <=to_date(#{time2},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and (prj_flag in (${prj_flag}) or '-1' in (${prj_flag}) ) )a ) Where m_rowNum > ${BegeinIndex} and m_rowNum <= ${EndIndex}

tfa_alarm_delay_sum.first_result , tfa_alarm_delay_sum.ne_name , tia_alarm_dict2.txt , trans_ems.userlabel )a ) Where m_rowNum > ${BegeinIndex} and m_rowNum <= ${EndIndex}
